---
permalink: /about/
title: "About Me"
excerpt: "About me"
output:
  md_document:
    pandoc_args: ["--wrap=none"]
    variant: gfm-smart
    preserve_yaml: TRUE
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {knitr::knit(inputFile, output = paste0('../',stringr::str_remove_all(inputFile, paste0(here::here(), '|', "/_source/", '|', "\\.Rmd")), '.md')) })
date: "2021/03/06"
last_modified_at: "2021/03/06"
layout: single
classes: wide
author_profile: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, cache=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(stringr)
library(here)
# get name of file during knitting and strip file extension
rmd_filename <- str_remove(knitr::current_input(), "\\.Rmd")

# Figure path on disk = base.dir + fig.path
# Figure URL online = base.url + fig.path
knitr::opts_knit$set(base.dir = str_c(here::here(),'/'), base.url= '{{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/') # project root folder
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	fig.path = str_c("assets/images/pages/", rmd_filename, '/'),
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	cache.path = "../cache/",
	dev = "svg",
	dpi = 300
)
```

<!-- ![kulbhushanchand]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/assets/images/pages/kulbhushanchand.jpg){: .align-center} -->

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=8, fig.width=14, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
VisualResume::VisualResume(
  titles.left = c("Kulbhushan Chand", "Electronics, Biofeedback, Games","*Built with love in R using VisualResume package"),
  titles.right = c("kulbhushanchand.github.io", "kulbhushan.chand@gmail.com",""),
  titles.right.cex = c(2, 2, 1),
  titles.left.cex = c(4, 2, 2),
  timeline.labels = c("Education", "Teaching"),
  timeline = data.frame(title = c("GNDU", "LPU", "NITJ", "LPU", "LPU", "LPU", "NITJ"),
                        sub = c("BTech Student", "MTech Student", "PhD Student", "Lecturer", "Teaching Assistant", "Assistant Prof.", "Teaching Assistant"),
                        start = c(2006.6, 2011.6, 2015.6, 2010.9, 2012.1, 2013.6, 2015.6),
                        end = c(2010.4, 2013.4, 2021.9, 2011.4, 2012.9, 2015.4, 2020.6),
                        side = c(1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0)),
  timeline.cex = c(1.8, 1.2),
  milestones = data.frame(title = c("BTech", "MTech", "PhD (Persuing)"),
                          sub = c("ECE", "ECE", "ECE"),
                          year = c(2010, 2013, 2021)),
  events = data.frame(year = c(2019.99, 2019.66, 2019.33, 2019.01),
                      title = c("Jain, B. et al. (2019). The Pursuit of Zero Food Waste [...]. in Global \nInitiatives for Waste Reduction and Cutting Food Loss.",
                                "Mukherjee, A. et al. (2019). Pursuit of Research [...]. in Fostering \nMultiple Levels of Engagement in Higher Education Environments.",
                                "Padmakar, G.S.V. et al. (2019). LearnEasy-Android Application [...]. in \nEmerging Trends in the Diagnosis and Intervention of [...]",
                                "Setia, D. et al. (2019). Enhancing Tourism [...]. in Positioning and \nBranding Tourism Destinations for Global Competitiveness.")),
  interests = list("programming" = c(rep("MATLAB", 7), rep("R", 3), rep("C/C++", 5), rep("Lua", 1)),
                   "research" = c(rep("Biofeedback", 6), rep("Gamification", 6), rep("Healthcare", 3)),
                   "sports" = c(rep("Running", 7), rep("Basketball", 5), rep("Cycling", 4))
                   ),
  year.steps = 1
)
```

## Education

My educational background is in **Electronics and Communication Engineering**. I received the B.Tech. degree in electronics and communication engineering from the [Guru Nanak Dev University](http://www.gndu.ac.in/) and the M.Tech. degree in electronics and communication engineering from the [Lovely Professional University](https://www.lpu.in/). At present, I'm working towards the Ph.D. degree in electronics and communication engineering with Prof. Arun Khosla at the [Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology](https://www.nitj.ac.in/). 

## Research Philosophy

My research interests include biofeedback, embedded systems, wearable physiological sensors and computing, healthcare, and gamification. I am passionate about open science and reproducible research and use Open Source Technologies for most of my projects.

## Teaching Philosophy

I have taught undergraduate and postgraduate engineering courses like `Microcontroller and its applications`, `Digital signal processing`, `Probability and stochastic theory`. I've TA'ed `Gamification` and `Electronics devices and digital electronics Lab` course.

## CV

- CV: [Download CV as PDF (Updated March, 2021)]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/assets/misc/CV.pdf)

## Contact

You can reach me via:  
**Email:** ```kulbhushan dot chand at gmail dot com```  
**PGP key ID:** ```065AFAF6``` and [key]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/assets/misc/4089AAAE4C9FDA8C24C9385F3D5410BB065AFAF6.asc)
